name: asmaz
description: asmaz — a production-ready headless Shopify storefront theme for Astro 6 (SSR): React islands, server-owned cart, customer accounts, multi-currency, and a magazine-style design system. Runs credential-free against Shopify's mock.shop demo API.

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m "chore: release %s" && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m "chore: release %s" && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m "chore: release %s" && git push && git push --tags
